title: Clogged Kitchen Sink
scene: 厨房水槽下水慢，你叫管道工。

turns.cn: 两边都堵还是一边？
turns.en: Both sides slow or just one?

turns.cn: 两边都慢，昨天开始。
turns.en: Both sides. Started yesterday.

turns.cn: 可能油脂堵了，我打开存水弯看看。
turns.en: Probably grease. I'll open the trap and check.

turns.cn: 通一次多少钱？
turns.en: How much to clear it?

turns.cn: 上门一百五，简单疏通包含在内。
turns.en: A hundred fifty service call, simple snaking included.

turns.cn: 以后怎么预防？
turns.en: How do we prevent this?

turns.cn: 别倒油，用热水定期冲。
turns.en: Don't pour grease. Flush with hot water regularly.

title: Toilet Overflow
scene: 马桶堵了溢水，你打紧急管道服务。

turns.cn: 管道紧急热线，什么问题？
turns.en: Emergency plumbing. What's the issue?

turns.cn: 马桶堵了水溢出来，只有这一个卫生间。
turns.en: Toilet's clogged and overflowing. It's our only bathroom.

turns.cn: 先关马桶后面阀门，师傅一小时到。
turns.en: Shut the valve behind the toilet. A tech can be there in an hour.

turns.cn: 夜间加急费多少？
turns.en: What's the after-hours fee?

turns.cn: 加五十，总价看情况。
turns.en: Fifty extra. Total depends on the job.

turns.cn: 好的，地址枫树街55号。
turns.en: Okay. Fifty-five Maple Street.

turns.cn: 师傅会打电话，请保持畅通。
turns.en: He'll call. Keep your phone on.

title: Water Heater Problem
scene: 洗澡没热水，管道工来检查热水器。

turns.cn: 燃气还是电的？用了几年？
turns.en: Gas or electric? How old is it?

turns.cn: 燃气，大概八年。
turns.en: Gas, about eight years old.

turns.cn: 点火器坏了，修二百或换新一千二。
turns.en: Igniter's shot. Two hundred to fix or twelve hundred for a new unit.

turns.cn: 换新包安装吗？
turns.en: Does replacement include installation?

turns.cn: 包，旧机我们拉走。
turns.en: Yes, and we haul the old one away.

turns.cn: 明天能装吗？
turns.en: Can you install tomorrow?

turns.cn: 下午两点可以。
turns.en: Two PM tomorrow works.

title: Garbage Disposal Jam
scene: 厨房垃圾处理器不转，你求助维修。

turns.cn: 垃圾处理器嗡嗡响但不转。
turns.en: The disposal hums but won't spin.

turns.cn: 可能卡了骨头或勺子，先断电。
turns.en: Probably jammed on bone or a spoon. Kill the power first.

turns.cn: 底下红色复位键按过了。
turns.en: I already hit the red reset button underneath.

turns.cn: 我用内六角从底部转一下。
turns.en: I'll use an Allen wrench from the bottom to free it.

turns.cn: 能修还是要换？
turns.en: Repair or replace?

turns.cn: 这次能救，老化严重再换。
turns.en: I can save it this time. Replace if it keeps jamming.

turns.cn: 谢谢，以后别倒骨头对吧？
turns.en: Thanks. No bones down there, right?

title: Frozen Pipes
scene: 冬天水管冻了，你叫紧急维修。

turns.cn: 哪条水管没水？地下室有冰吗？
turns.en: Which line has no water? Any ice in the basement?

turns.cn: 厨房没水，地下室管子有霜。
turns.en: Kitchen's dry. There's frost on a pipe in the basement.

turns.cn: 先开暖气，我用热风枪慢慢化。
turns.en: Turn up the heat. I'll thaw it slowly with a heat gun.

turns.cn: 会裂吗？
turns.en: Could it burst?

turns.cn: 有可能，我检查有没有渗。
turns.en: It's possible. I'll check for leaks after.

turns.cn: 以后怎么防冻？
turns.en: How do we prevent this?

turns.cn: 寒流时让水龙头细流滴水。
turns.en: Let faucets drip during hard freezes.
